fields.name: Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer who owns the items on the service order.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Bill-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer that you send or sent the invoice or credit memo to.

fields.name: Bill-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer that you send or sent the invoice or credit memo to.

fields.name: Bill-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the customer that you send or sent the invoice or credit memo to.

fields.name: Bill-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the customer to whom you sent the invoice.

fields.name: Bill-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional line of the address.

fields.name: Bill-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the address.

fields.name: Bill-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip: Specifies a reference to the customer.

fields.name: Ship-to Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for an alternate shipment address if you want to ship to another address than the one that has been entered automatically. This field is also used in case of drop shipment.

fields.name: Ship-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of thethe name of the customer at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the ship-to address, in case it is a long address.

fields.name: Ship-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Order Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related order was created.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the shipment was posted.

fields.name: Posting Description
fields.tooltip:
Contains the type and number of the document from which the current shipment was created.
The program copies the posting description from the Posting Description field on the service header.
You cannot change the posting description because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Payment Terms Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code that the program uses to retrieve payment terms applying to the shipment. The program uses payment terms to manage due dates and calculate payment discount percentages.
The program copies the code from the Payment Terms Code field on the service header.
You cannot change the payment terms code because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip:
Contains the date on which the shipment is due for payment. The program can use the due date to find customers with overdue bills.
The date is copied from the Due Date field on the service header.
You cannot change the due date in the posted shipment.

fields.name: Payment Discount %
fields.tooltip:
Contains the percentage of payment discount that is granted to the customer if they pay by the date specified in the Pmt. Discount Date field.
The program copies the discount percentage from the Payment Discount % field on the service header.
You cannot change the payment discount percentage because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Pmt. Discount Date
fields.tooltip:
Contains the date that the customer must pay for the shipment by in order to obtain a payment discount.
The program copies the date from the Pmt. Discount Date field on the service header.
You cannot change the value in the field when the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Shipment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipment method for the shipment.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location, such as warehouse or distribution center, from where the items on the order were shipped.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Customer Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code of the customer posting group assigned to the bill-to customer on the shipment.
The program copies the code from the Customer Posting Group field on the service header.
You cannot change the customer posting group code because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code for various amounts on the shipment.

fields.name: Currency Factor
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a currency factor if an additional reporting currency was set in the General Ledger Setup window. The currency factor shows the relationship between the additional reporting currency and the local currency. The program will automatically record amounts in both LCY and the additional reporting currency, using the relevant exchange rate and the currency factor.
The value of the currency factor is copied from the Currency Factor field in the Service Header table.
You cannot change the value in this field because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Customer Price Group
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code of the price group that the customer belongs to. The code is used when the program calculates the unit price for items on the shipment lines. The program checks the Sales Price table to see whether the customer in this price group will be charged a different item price than the one specified in the Unit Price field on the item card.
The program copies the customer price group code from the Customer Price Group field on the service header.
You cannot change the customer price group because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Prices Including VAT
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that the unit prices on the shipment lines include VAT.
The program copies the information from the Prices Including VAT field on the service header.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Invoice Disc. Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code that the program uses to find the invoice discount you give to the customer.
The program copies the code from the Invoice Disc. Code field on the service header.
You cannot change the value in the field when the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Customer Disc. Group
fields.tooltip:
Contains the discount group code assigned to the Bill-to Customer No. The program uses the code to calculate the service line discount given to the customer.
The code is copied from the Customer Disc. Group field in the Service Header table.
You cannot change the customer discount group code in the posted shipment.

fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains a code for the language used on the shipment lines. The program also uses the language on any printouts for the bill-to customer.
The code is copied from the Language Code field in the Service Header table.
You cannot change the language code because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Salesperson Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the salesperson assigned to the service order.

fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service order from which the shipment was created.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip:
Indicates whether there are any comments attached to the current service shipment.
To view a comment or create a new one, click Related Information, point to Shipment, and then click Comments. A window then appears that displays existing comments and allow you to create new ones.
You can also enter a comment in Notes FactBox.

fields.name: No. Printed
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many times the document has been printed.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. Type
fields.tooltip:
Indicates whether the shipment has been applied to an already posted document. If so, the field shows the type of the document applied to.
The program copies the information from the Applies-to Doc. Type field on the service header.
You cannot change the applies-to document type because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. No.
fields.tooltip:
Indicates whether the shipment has been applied to an already posted document. If so, the field contains the number of the document it was applied to.
The program copies the document number from the Applies-to Doc. No. field in the Service Header table.
You cannot change the number because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Bal. Account No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of the general ledger account or the bank account to which the program posted a balancing entry for the shipment.
The program copies the balancing account number from the Bal. Account No. field on the header of the service order/invoice.
You cannot change the number in the field because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Registration No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the VAT registration number of the bill-to customer.
The program copies the number from the VAT Registration No. field on the header of the service order.
You cannot change the VAT registration number in the posted shipment.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains a code that indicates why the entry was created. Thus the reason code will enable you to trace the entry.
The program copies the code from the Reason Code field on the header on the service order.
You cannot change the reason code because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Contains the general business posting group code assigned to the customer whom you send the invoice for the service.
The program copies the code from the Gen. Bus. Posting Group field on the header of the service order.
You cannot change the code in the posted shipment.

fields.name: EU 3-Party Trade
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the transaction is related to trade with a third party within the EU.

fields.name: Transaction Type
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the transaction type assigned to the posted service shipment. You use the pre-set types to report your trade with other EU countries/regions (see also INTRASTAT).
The program copies the transaction type from the Transaction Type field on the service header of the order.
You cannot change the code when the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Transport Method
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code of the transport method used for shipment of items on the service order.
The program copies the transport method from the Transport Method field on the header of the service order you post.
You cannot change the transport method code when the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip:
Displays the bill-to customer's VAT country/region code. The information will be used in the VAT- VIES Declaration Tax Auth report in connection with trade with other EU countries/regions and in INTRASTAT reporting.
The program copies the code from the VAT Country/Region Code field on the header of the service order.
You cannot change the VAT country/region code in the posted shipment.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer.

fields.name: Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the customer on the posted service shipment.

fields.name: Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the customer of the posted service shipment.

fields.name: Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the address.

fields.name: Contact Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the customer company.

fields.name: Bill-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code of the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Bill-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county for the customer that the invoice is sent to.

fields.name: Bill-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county related to the posted service shipment.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.

fields.name: Ship-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to County
fields.tooltip:
Contains the county of the customer's shipping address.
The program copies the county name from the Ship-to County field on the service header.
You cannot change the contents of the field when the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Ship-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Bal. Account Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the type of the account to which balancing entries are posted for the posted service shipment.
The program copies the information from the Bal. Account Type field in the Service Header table when you post the shipment.
You cannot change the balancing account type because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Exit Point
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code of the exit port through which you ship the service out of your country/region.
The program copies the code from the Exit Point field on the header of the service order.
You cannot change the code because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Correction
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that this service shipment has been posted as a corrective entry.
The program copies the code from the Correction field on the service header.
You cannot change the code because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a document number that refers to the customer's numbering system.

fields.name: Area
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the area where the customer company is located.
The program copies the code from the Area field on the header of the service order.
You cannot change the area code in the posted shipment.

fields.name: Transaction Specification
fields.tooltip:
Contains the transaction specification code that was used in the shipment. The code is used in INTRASTAT reporting.
The program copies the code from the Transaction Specification field on the header of the service order.
You cannot change the value in this field in the posted shipment.

fields.name: Payment Method Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the method that the customer uses to pay for the service. The program copies the code from the Payment Method Code field on the header of the service order.
You cannot change or delete the code in the posted shipment.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which shipping agent is used to transport the items on the service document to the customer.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code of the number series that was used to assign a number to the service shipment.
The program copies the code from the Shipping No. Series field on the header of the service order that was shipped.
You cannot change the number series on the posted shipment.

fields.name: Order No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the number series of the service order from which the shipment was created.
The program automatically copies this field from the No. Series field on the header of the service order.
You cannot change the number series because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip:
Contains the ID of the user who posted the service shipment.
You cannot change the user ID because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the source code assigned to the service shipment header. The code is used to determine the origin of the entry.
The program retrieves the value from the Source Code Setup table.
You cannot change the source code because the entry has been posted.

fields.name: Tax Area Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code of the tax area where the bill-to customer is located.
In combination with the tax group code, the program uses the value in this field to determine the sales tax % and the G/L accounts for sales tax posting.
The program copies the value from the Tax Area Code field on the header of the service order that was shipped.

fields.name: Tax Liable
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that the bill-to customer is liable to the sales tax. If the field is blank, the program does not calculate the sales tax.
The program copies the code from the Tax Liable field on the service header.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the VAT business posting group of the bill-to customer.
The program copies the code from the VAT Bus. Posting Group field on the header of the service order.

fields.name: VAT Base Discount %
fields.tooltip:
Indicates the percentage used for discounting the VAT element when a payment discount is posted.
The program checks the value against the maximum possible VAT Tolerance % specified in the General Ledger Setup window.
The value in the field is copied from the VAT Base Discount % field on the header of the service order.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


You cannot change the contents of this field. Click the drop-down arrow to see the combination of posted dimension values.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.

fields.name: Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact person at the customer's site.

fields.name: Bill-to Contact No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of the contact whom you send the invoice for the shipment.
The program copies the code from the Bill-to Contact No. field in the Service Header table when you post the shipment.
You cannot change the code because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the responsibility center, such as a distribution hub, that is associated with the involved user, company, customer, or vendor.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Service Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which shipping agent service is used to transport the items on the service document to the customer.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a date interval that values are filtered by.
If this field contains the starting and ending dates of a date interval, then other field values show information only for that interval.
The following table shows the rules to use for entering a date interval.


Meaning


Sample expression


Entries that are included


Equal to

12 15 12

Only entries that are posted on December 15, 2012.


Interval

12 15 12..01 15 13
..12 15 12

Entries that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and January 15, 2013.
Entries that are posted on January 15, 2012, or earlier.


Either/or

12 15 12|12 16 12

Entries that are posted on either December 15, 2012, or December 16, 2012. If there are entries that are posted on both days, then all entries are displayed.


You can also combine the various format types.


Sample expression


Entries that are included


12 15 12|12 01 12..12 10 12

Entries that are posted either on December 15, 2012, or on dates between and including December 1, 2012, and December 10, 2012.


..12 14 12|12 30 12..

Entries that are posted on December 14, 2012, or earlier, or entries that are posted on December 30, 2012, or later, which includes all entries except those that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and December 29, 2012.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the order from which the shipment was posted.

fields.name: Service Order Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the service order from which the shipment was created.

fields.name: Link Service to Service Item
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value in this field from the Link Service to Service Item field on the service header.

fields.name: Priority
fields.tooltip: Specifies the priority of the posted service order.

fields.name: Allocated Hours
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of hours allocated to the items within the posted service order.

fields.name: Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer phone number.

fields.name: E-Mail
fields.tooltip: Specifies the email address of the customer.

fields.name: Phone No. 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies your customer's alternate phone number.

fields.name: Fax No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the fax number of the customer in the posted shipment.
The program copies the number from the Fax No. field on the header of the service order.

fields.name: No. of Unallocated Items
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of service items on the order that have not been allocated to resources yet.
The program copies the value from the No. of Unallocated Items field on the header of the service order you post.

fields.name: Order Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when the service order was created.

fields.name: Default Response Time (Hours)
fields.tooltip:
Contains the estimated number of hours from the creation of the service order to the time when the service on the service item line started.
The program copies the time from the Default Response Time (Hours) field on the header of the service order you shipped. You cannot change the value because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Actual Response Time (Hours)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the hours since the creation of the service order, to the time when the order status was changed from Pending to In Process.

fields.name: Service Time (Hours)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total time in hours that the service on the service order has taken.

fields.name: Response Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the approximate date when work on the service order started.

fields.name: Response Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the approximate time when work on the service order started.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date of the service on the shipment.

fields.name: Starting Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting time of the service on the shipment.

fields.name: Finishing Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the service is finished.

fields.name: Finishing Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when the service is finished.

fields.name: Contract Serv. Hours Exist
fields.tooltip:
Specifies if the service shipment is linked to a certain service contract. A check mark in the field indicates that there are specific service hours attached to the service contract, which apply to the current service shipment as well.
The program copies the field value from the Contract Serv. Hours Exist field on the header of the service order.

fields.name: Reallocation Needed
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that you must reallocate resources to at least one service item in this service shipment.
The program copies the value in this field from the Reallocation Needed field on the service header.

fields.name: Notify Customer
fields.tooltip: Specifies in what way the customer wants to receive notifications about the service completed.

fields.name: Max. Labor Unit Price
fields.tooltip:
Contains the maximum unit price set for a resource (for example, a technician) on all service shipment lines that subject to the service shipment.
The program copies the field value from the Max. Labor Unit Price field on the service header when the service order is shipped.

fields.name: Warning Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the warning status for the response time on the original service order.

fields.name: No. of Allocations
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of resource allocations to service items on the service order.
The program automatically copies the value from the No. of Allocations field on the Service Header table when the service order is posted.

fields.name: Contract No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contract associated with the service order.

fields.name: Type Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a type filter. There are five options: Blank, Resource, Item, Service Cost and Service Contract. If you set the filter, the program will produce service ledger entries with the specified type.
For example, if the field is set to Resource, the Dispatch Board window will display information related to service ledger entries with the Resource type only .

fields.name: Customer Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a customer filter. The filter enables the program to limit the information range to the entries related to the specified customer.
If this field contains a customer number, the Dispatch Board window will show service shipments for that particular customer only.

fields.name: Resource Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a resource filter.
If this field is set to a certain resource number, fields such as No. of Allocations will only display information on service order allocations with that particular resource. The Dispatch Board window will also show the overview of the documents containing the service item lines to which the specified resource is allocated.

fields.name: Contract Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a service contract filter.
If this field contains a service contract number, the Dispatch Board window will display service shipments linked to that particular contract only.

fields.name: Ship-to Fax No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the fax number of the customer to whom the service on the order has been shipped.
The program copies the number from the Ship-to Fax No. field on the header of the service order you post.

fields.name: Ship-to E-Mail
fields.tooltip: Specifies the email address at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Resource Group Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a resource group filter.
If this field contains a particular resource group number, fields such as the No. of Allocations field will only display information on the service shipment allocations with that resource group. The Dispatch Board window will also show the overview of the documents containing the service item lines to which the specified resource group is allocated.

fields.name: Ship-to Phone
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer phone number.

fields.name: Ship-to Phone 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional phone number at address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Service Zone Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a service zone filter.
If this field contains a service zone code, the Dispatch Board window will show service shipments for customers within that particular service zone only.

fields.name: Service Zone Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the service zone code assigned to the customer.

fields.name: Expected Finishing Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when service on the order is expected to be finished.

fields.name: Allow Line Disc.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that a discount will be calculated on the service order.
The program retrieves the value from the Allow Line Disc. field on the service header.
You cannot change the value since the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Quote No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service quote document if a quote was used to start the service process.
